name: Dexamethasone
description: Long-agens synthetica corticosteroidea. Usus est pro OEDEMA cerebri (altitude altitudinis cerebri OEDEMA - HACE, TBI), graves motus allergici, OEDEMA airway, et discrimen adrenal. Inflammatio anti-, non anabolica.
indications: Oedema cerebri de tumore vel apostemate
dose: Oedema cerebri / HACE: 8-10 mg initialis IV/IM, dein 4 mg q6h. Airway OEDEMA: semel X mg IV. Croup: 0.6 mg/kg IM/PO (max 16mg). Discrimen adrenal: 4 mg IV.
window: HACE: Da quam primum cum proximo descensu.
contraindications: Virus vaccina vive intra XXX dies (relativum)
warnings: Descensum et oxygenium pro HACE non substituit - usus tantum adiuncti.
Hyperglycemia -- Monitor glucosus sanguinis in diabeticis.
Singula doses pro subitis plerumque tutissima sunt.

pediatric.dose: Croup: 0.6 mg/kg PO/IM (max 16 mg). Oedema cerebri: 0.5-1 mg/kg IV (max 10 mg). Airway hydropicus: 0.5 mg/kg IV.

obstetric.note: 12 mg IM q24h x 2 doses ad maturationem foetus pulmonis ad 24-34 hebdomades partus in labore preterito accelerant. De summa provisor praesto est.

source: JTS CPG / Wilderness Medicine / Standard Emergency Pharmacology
